scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:digital && npm run typecheck:homomorphism
scripts.verify: npm run arch --silent && npm run typecheck --silent && node test/ast_conformance.mjs && node test/run_guards.mjs
scripts.prepare: npm run bundle:libs && (npm run gate:install || true)
scripts.gate:install: install -m 755 scripts/pre-push .git/hooks/pre-push && echo "[gate] hook installe depuis scripts/pre-push (versionne)"
